summary: Complete testing of Kryptobox Crypto Exchange - GlowText animation and JWT authentication. All backend APIs passing (14/14 tests). All frontend features working correctly.

minor.issue: passlib warning about bcrypt version - non-blocking but shows in logs

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing 'token' dependency - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: AuthContext.jsx line 47 has ESLint warning for missing 'token' dependency in useEffect - consider adding '// eslint-disable-next-line' or fixing the dependency array
Minor: passlib bcrypt version warning in logs - cosmetic only, auth still works correctly
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during backend testing with prefix test_user_ and test_
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. GlowText animation is visible on Products, Trust, and Regions sections. JWT auth flow complete - register, login, get profile, update profile all working. Header correctly shows Login button when unauthenticated and user's first name with profile link when authenticated.

glowtext_animation.products_section: PASS - Text visible with opacity=1, letters render correctly
glowtext_animation.trust_section: PASS - 'Why the Elite Choose Kryptobox' visible
glowtext_animation.regions_section: PASS - 'Serving Excellence Across Three Continents' visible

frontend_auth.register_form_fields: PASS - name, email, password, phone, country all present
frontend_auth.registration_flow: PASS - Creates account, redirects to profile
frontend_auth.profile_page: PASS - Shows user info, edit/logout buttons
frontend_auth.profile_edit: PASS - Can edit name, phone, country
frontend_auth.authenticated_header: PASS - Shows user name instead of Login
